zh.lifeSummary: 當Barbara de Lascelles於1352年出生在英國越可爾拉勒斯 霍爾時，她的父親John FitzRanulf28歲，母親Matilda de Campania27歲。她於大約1385年與Thomas Stansfield在英國越可爾結婚。他們至少是4個兒子的父母。她去世於1389年之後在英國越可爾史坦菲爾德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Barbara de Lascelles于1352年出生在英国越可爾拉勒斯 霍爾时，她的父亲John FitzRanulf28岁，母亲Matilda de Campania27岁。她于大约1385年与Thomas Stansfield在英国越可爾结婚。他们至少是4个儿子的父母。她去世于1389年之后在英国越可爾史坦菲爾德。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Lascelles
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): habitational name from one of the large number of places in northern France called Celle, Celles, Lacelle, Leschelle, or Lachelle, all from French celle ‘hermitage’, and at different times occurring both with and without the plural -s.
Variant of   Lacelle   1, a surname of French origin.

variants.name: Laswell
meanings: English: possibly an altered form of   Lascelles  . This surname is also found as   Lacefield  .

variants.name: Lacelle
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Alain, Andre, Aurele, Benoit, Cecile, Marcel, Marie Paule.
Altered form of French Laselle: habitational name from La Selle, the name of several places in various parts of France. The surname Laselle is very rare in France, found in Marne. Compare Lascelles .

In some cases possibly also French: habitational name from Lacelle in Corrèze or numerous minor places called La Celle, all named for a monastic cell or hermitage in their vicinity, from French celle ‘hermitage’.

nameMeanings.name: Barbara
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From Latin, meaning ‘foreign woman’ (a feminine form of barbarus ‘foreign’, from Greek, referring originally to the unintelligible chatter of foreigners, which sounded to the Greek ear like no more than bar-bar). St Barbara has always been one of the most popular saints in the calendar, although there is some doubt whether she ever actually existed. According to legend, she was imprisoned in a tower and later murdered by her father, who was then struck down by a bolt of lightning. Accordingly, she is the patron of architects, stonemasons, and fortifications, and of firework makers, artillerymen, and gunpowder magazines.

variants.name: Barbra
meanings: From Latin, meaning ‘foreign woman’ (a feminine form of barbarus ‘foreign’, from Greek, referring originally to the unintelligible chatter of foreigners, which sounded to the Greek ear like no more than bar-bar). St Barbara has always been one of the most popular saints in the calendar, although there is some doubt whether she ever actually existed. According to legend, she was imprisoned in a tower and later murdered by her father, who was then struck down by a bolt of lightning. Accordingly, she is the patron of architects, stonemasons, and fortifications, and of firework makers, artillerymen, and gunpowder magazines.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Barbara de Lascelles was born in 1352, in Lascelles Hall, Yorkshire, England, her father, John FitzRanulf, was 28 and her mother, Matilda de Campania, was 27. She married Thomas Stansfield about 1385, in Yorkshire, England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons. She died after 1389, in Stansfield, Yorkshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Barbara de Lascelles est née en 1352, à Lascelles Hall, Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, John FitzRanulf, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Matilda de Campania, avait 27 ans. Elle a épousé Thomas Stansfield environ 1385, à Everwyck, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils. Elle est décédée après 1389, à Stansfield, Everwyck, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Barbara de Lascelles 1352 in Lascelles Hall, Yorkshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John FitzRanulf 28 und ihre Mutter Matilda de Campania 27. Sie hat um 1385 in Yorkshire, England Thomas Stansfield geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne. Sie starb nach 1389 in Stansfield, Yorkshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Barbara de Lascelles è nata il nel 1352 nel Lascelles Hall, Yorkshire, England, sua padre, John FitzRanulf, aveva 28 anni e sua madre, Matilda de Campania, aveva 27 anni. Lei sposato Thomas Stansfield circa 1385, nel Yorkshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli. Morì dopo il 1389, nel Stansfield, Yorkshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Barbara de Lascellesが1352年にイギリスヨークシュアイアラスセレス ハルで生まれた時，父John FitzRanulfは28歳，母Matilda de Campaniaは27歳であった。約1385年にイギリスヨークシュアイアでThomas Stansfieldと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子の親であった。彼女は1389年以後にイギリスヨークシュアイアスタンスフィールドで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Barbara de Lascelles(이)가 1352년 영국 요르크실르 래스셀레스 홀에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John FitzRanulf(은)는 28세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Matilda de Campania(은)는 27세였다. 그녀는 대략 1385년 영국 요르크실르에서 Thomas Stansfield(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1389년 이후 영국 요르크실르 스탠스필드에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Barbara de Lascelles nasceu em 1352, em Lascelles Hall, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, John FitzRanulf, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Matilda de Campania, tinha 27 anos. Ela casou-se com Thomas Stansfield aproximadamente 1385, em Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos. Ela faleceu após 1389, em Stansfield, Yorkshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Barbara de Lascelles родилась в 1352 г. в местности ласселлесь холл, еркшир, Англия, её отцу по имени John FitzRanulf было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Matilda de Campania, 27. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Thomas Stansfield около 1385 г. в местности еркшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына. Она умерла после 1389 г. в местности стансфиелд, еркшир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Barbara de Lascelles nació en 1352, en Lascelles Hall, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, su papá, John FitzRanulf, tenía 28 años y su mamá, Matilda de Campania, tenía 27 años. Se casó con Thomas Stansfield aproximadamente 1385, en Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos. Murió después de 1389, en Stansfield, Yorkshire, Inglaterra.
